Defendant Plant Insulation Companys Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Action
Off Calendar May-05-2008 Advanced From May-05-08 To May-05-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: ATTY. WILLIAM R. RUIZ OF BRAYTON PURCELL, LLP, TEL. 898-1555 FOR PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RODERICK HILL, OF LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP, TEL. 362-2580 FOR DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY PLANT INSULATION COMPANY.

RULING: A R G U E D. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Plant Insulation Company's Motion To Dismiss Action IS DENIED. 5 years have not passed since the October 2005 Stipulation which defendant should have brought to the court's attention in its moving papers. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB)
